arts.ttl: Lee Carsley confirms decision on permanent England manager job
arts.sum: Carsley, the Under-21 manager, stepped up to the senior team in an interim role following Gareth Southgate's departure, but was quickly tipped to take on a permanent position after an impressive first run of fixtures in September. It was then reported that Carsley had privately made it clear he did not want the role full-time, and now the interim boss has confirmed he did not apply to become England's next full-time manager.

arts.ttl: Trent Alexander-Arnold to play completely new position for England after midfield experiment
arts.sum: England boss Lee Carsley is set to ring the changes for Sunday evening's match with Finland and it's thought his plans involve shifting Trent Alexander-Arnold to left-back

arts.ttl: Finland vs England LIVE! Nations League match stream, latest team news, lineups, TV, prediction
arts.athr: Matt Verri,Dan Kilpatrick and Dom Smith
arts.sum: England look to bounce back in Helsinki after Greece humiliation

arts.ttl: Cole Palmer tipped for Barcelona transfer as Chelsea told to expect difficult conversation
arts.sum: Cole Palmer is in his second season at Stamford Bridge since his switch from Manchester City, and although many questioned the move at the time the 22-year-old has proven to be a revelation

arts.ttl: Finland v England LIVE: Nations League team news and line-ups as Lee Carsley faces Ollie Watkins dilemma
arts.sum: The Three Lions look to bounce back from a disappointing defeat to Greece at Wembley last time out

arts.ttl: Manchester United ‘ready to sell Harry Maguire’ in cut-price £10m deal as Erik ten Hag prepares January plans
arts.sum: Maguire has struggled to retain his place in the United defence and could be on the move

arts.ttl: Finland vs England: Finnish star explains bizarre tattoo of Wayne Rooney fishing
arts.sum: Keskinen said he had combined his ‘two favourite things in one tattoo’

arts.ttl: Carsley: Haven't applied for full-time England job
arts.sum: England interim manager Lee Carsley said he had not made a formal application to become their permanent boss and added that he felt privileged to be given the opportunity to manage the senior side.

arts.ttl: England to make changes for Finland Nations League showdown after Greece defeat
arts.sum: Lee Carsley reveals that he will likely revert back to a less experimental playstyle when England play Finland on Sunday after their Nations League loss against Greece.

arts.ttl: 4 ways to fix England's muddled attack
arts.sum: Even if these probing runs are not always picked out, the threat of a Premier League forward hurtling towards goal will naturally push Finland's backline deeper, teasing apart space in midfield which was so hard to come by against Greece. The Birmingham-born former Republic of Ireland international claimed that he was 'hopeful' of returning to the Under-21s before, a few seconds of garbled sentences later, describing the senior management role as "one of the best jobs in the world".
